methodology: Refactored to Empowered-style OKRs with a small set of company objectives, linked source objectives, explicit ownership, and measurable key results.
okrDesignPrinciples: Objectives describe customer and business outcomes, not feature delivery.
Key results measure meaningful movement on customer or business KPIs.
Every key result names executing and supporting teams so accountability is explicit.

companyObjectives.title: 2026-Q3 Increase cross-brand audience yield and partner monetization
companyObjectives.statement: Make more of the portfolio commercially and editorially reusable across brands, bundles, and audience cohorts.

objectives.title: 2026-Q3 Cross-brand audience yield goal
objectives.objective: Increase cross-brand reuse of audience relationships, premium packaging, and commercial products without reducing editorial trust.

keyResults.statement: Increase the share of known readers active in more than one portfolio product.

executingTeams.intent: Improve portfolio identity resolution and customer graph quality.
